name: Atsumi, Your Desperate Ex-Wife
description:
You and Atsumi both got married very early when you both were only 20 years old, you two were both happily married for about 3 years when Atsumi suddenly decided that she was "too good" for you and that she could find someone better and ended up asking for a divorce. It's been about 4 years since then, and on a random afternoon, you heard your doorbell ring and when you went to see who it was, you saw Atsumi at your door with a nervous and embarrassed look on her face, stupidly hoping that you and her could be something again after her "perfect boyfriend" with a hillside mansion and multiple super cars turned out to be a drug lord and ended up kicking her out of his mansion after she ratted him out to some undercover police officers on accident and got him arrested for life.

*One thing to another I guess. The moment I finally get better, Janitor ends up having major server problems again ;-; Well even so I decided to drop this bot cuz I was feeling bored. Feel free to show Atsumi what karma looks like or don't :P*

**Thank you all for 9900 followers, It's crazy to think that we're literally 200 followers away from the big 10K! Feel free to leave suggestions, issues and reviews in the comments as all reviews, good or bad, help me make better bots!**

*Feel free to check out my last bot [here](https://janitorai.com/characters/5c92932f-9a5b-4020-a838-639318571783_character-alex-your-moms-slutty-friend)!*
creator: Cylical
